recommendations.title: Pet Sematary
recommendations.overview: After the Creed family's cat is accidentally killed, a friendly neighbor advises its burial in a mysterious nearby cemetery.

recommendations.title: Gates of Heaven
recommendations.overview: A documentary about a pet cemetery in California, and the people who have pets buried there.

recommendations.title: The Eternal Daughter
recommendations.overview: An artist and her elderly mother confront long-buried secrets when they return to a former family home, now a hotel haunted by its mysterious past.

recommendations.title: The Half of It
recommendations.overview: Shy, straight-A student Ellie is hired by sweet but inarticulate jock Paul, who needs help wooing the most popular girl in school. But their new and unlikely friendship gets tricky when Ellie discovers she has feelings for the same girl.

recommendations.title: Family Blood
recommendations.overview: Ellie, a recovering drug addict, has just moved to a new city with her two teenage children. She has struggled to stay sober in the past and is determined to make it work this time, finding a stable job and regularly attending her meetings. Unfortuna

recommendations.title: Sheep Without a Shepherd
recommendations.overview: Li and his wife A Yu run a small business in Thailand and enjoy a happy home life with their two daughters. When their eldest daughter is violently assaulted, blackmailed and left traumatised by another student, her parents intervene, leading to a de

recommendations.title: There's Something Wrong with the Children
recommendations.overview: Margaret and Ben take a weekend trip with longtime friends Ellie and Thomas and their two young children. Eventually, Ben begins to suspect something supernatural is occurring when the kids behave strangely after disappearing into the woods overnight

recommendations.title: The House by the Cemetery
recommendations.overview: After a doctor kills his mistress and himself while researching the mysterious previous owner of his Boston home, his colleague, Dr. Norman Boyle, takes over his studies and moves his family into the Boston mansion. Soon after, Boyle's young son Bob

recommendations.title: The Cellar
recommendations.overview: When Keira Woods' daughter mysteriously vanishes in the cellar of their new house in the country, she soon discovers there is an ancient and powerful entity controlling their home that she will have to face or risk losing her family's souls forever.

recommendations.title: The Shortcut
